message:
fix: remove conflicting aria-live from role=alert error banner (#5918)

role="alert" already implies aria-live="assertive". Setting
aria-live="polite" alongside is conflicting for assistive technology.
Remove the explicit aria-live since role=alert handles it.

Fixes #5916

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
